overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking along a dirt path to a wooden dock by a river. An eagle companion flies in and lands on the character's arm as they explore the waterfront area with palm trees and ancient ruins visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path along riverbank with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward the waterfront wooden dock

entered.detail: brown dirt trail with visible tire tracks and footprints
tall palm trees lining the riverbank in the distance
stone archway and temple ruins across the river
calm greenish river water with lily pads
weathered wooden posts with rope fencing along path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path toward a river in a sunny ancient Egyptian landscape. Palm trees frame the view while stone ruins stand visible across the water, and wooden fence posts line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over river water

events.description: character steps from dirt path onto wooden dock structure over the water

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden dock toward the end of the pier over the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a pier over the water
thick wooden support posts with rope lashings
large willow tree with hanging branches overhanging the dock

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wooden dock extending over the river, passing under a weeping willow tree. The wooden planks and support posts become prominent as the water appears closer beneath the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of wooden dock with open water views

events.description: eagle swoops down from sky and lands on character's left arm
character turns around 180 degrees to face back toward shore

agents.ego_description: standing at dock edge as eagle lands on arm, then turning to walk back

notable_agents.action: eagle flies in from the sky and lands on character's left forearm, folding its wings

segments.scene_description: At the end of the dock, an eagle flies in and lands on the character's arm. The character then turns around, shifting the view from the open water back toward the shore, with the ancient ruins now appearing on the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock return path with rope railings

agents.ego_description: walking back along dock with eagle perched on arm, surveying the river and ruins

notable_agents.action: eagle remains perched on character's arm, occasionally flapping wings

entered.detail: thick rope handrails strung between wooden posts along dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks back along the wooden dock toward shore with the eagle companion perched on their arm. Rope railings line the right side of the path, and the ancient ruins shift back to the center of the view as the character returns along the pier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched dirt path toward a riverfront dock and back again. It begins with the character walking along a dusty trail lined with wooden fence posts and palm trees, moving steadily toward the water where stone ruins stand in the distance. As the character transitions from the earth to a wooden dock, the view passes under the branches of a weeping willow tree while the river becomes visible beneath the planks. The scene then reaches the end of the pier where an eagle flies in to land on the character's arm, prompting a turn that shifts the perspective from the open water back toward the shore. Finally, the camera retreats along the dock with the eagle perched on the character's arm, passing rope railings as the ancient ruins slide back into the center of the frame.
